The '''''Hugo''''' was a [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]] used by Overlord [[Ghorin]] to be part of a convoy to deliver [[Grain/Legends|grain]] to the Imperials. Unfortunately the freighter, along with the ''[[Grotius]]'', were disabled along with the rest of the convoy by Rebel [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]]. They were then boarded by Rebel freighters intending to swap grain cargos in order to discredit Ghorin as a traitor.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: Imperial Pursuit]]''
